query:
INSERT INTO banned_users (telegram_id, phone_number, ban_reason, banned_by)
        VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
        ON CONFLICT (telegram_id) DO UPDATE
        SET phone_number = EXCLUDED.phone_number,
            ban_reason = EXCLUDED.ban_reason,
            banned_by = EXCLUDED.banned_by,
            banned_at = NOW()
